UserComments.Comment: Again charged successfully from free Schuko socket.

Satisfied as usually by 1 of 2 free 6A sockets,with my 1-phase onboard charger i always let Mennekes free for those with 3-phase onboard chargers & enjoying slow,but free charging without having to use an adapter.

Do not exceed 3hrs.of continuous charging from Mennekes socket,to fully charge Your battery restart charging every 3hrs. to avoid extra fees,or if U can limit charging current on Your home-charging cable,set current to 6A & charge from free Schuko socket,it has no time limit,no authentication, free of charge, but it is only for patient persons,I am using this charging station regularly,always over night,I accustomed myself to always sleep here during my regular trips to Bratislava, if I am charging from Schuko socket,I do not have to set alarms,thus I can sleep here for 8hrs.(or more) & when I wake up,my vehicle is just fully charged even with only 6A current, it is my favorite overnight charging station, even restaurants & thus toilets r little far from charging station, but after a night onboard my Green Voyager, it comes very handy,here is a nice park with free water tap,which is also priceless,when U have a Dog or other Animal onboard, U can also use it as Charge+Ride parking for trips to Wien,as Schuko sockets has no time limit,U can set slow charging & go to railroad station(~250m north & then west) & travel to Wien by a commuter train,excellent, when U r nervous about driving in a metropolis,U can use mass-transportation & then return to Your vehicle,which will be fully charged on Your return,so also if U r a club-person,this is an excellent place to dock Your vehicle & go clubbing by train to Wien,thus overall it is an excellent charging station, enjoy. Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Schuko sockets r free of charge; charging from Mennekes by EVN tariff.

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station (AC).
AddressInfo.AddressLine1: A Square @ The Beginning Of Bahnhof Strasse.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: 1 very huge dedicated parking place,probably U can fit 2 small vehicles like C0/iMiEV/iOn here,or 1 normally wide electric car +several e-bikes or e-scooters,or 1 van/caravan/freight car,or 1 car+trailer,if U r skilled with reversing with a trailer.

GeneralComments: Nice place,public water tap @ the location, park,restaurant & restroom about 1Km far-way to Gänserndorf.
